output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?previousClubLabel WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P527 wd:Q19444 ; p:P3349 ?transferStatement .
  ?transferStatement ps:P3349 ?previousClub .
  ?transferStatement pq:P134 ?fee .
  ?fee wikibase:amount ?amount ; wikibase:unit wd:Q139 .
  FILTER(?amount = 200000)
  .
  ?transferStatement pq:P580 ?transferDate .
  FILTER(?transferDate >= "1997-07-01" ^^ xsd:date && ?transferDate <= "1998-06-30" ^^ xsd:date)
  .
  ?previousClub rdfs:label ?previousClubLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?previousClubLabel) = "en")
}
